definition: to successfully reach a goal through effort
example: I want to achieve a high score on my test.

definition: the process of doing something
example: Quick action saved the bird.

definition: to have the same opinion as someone else
example: I agree that we should help.

definition: to let someone do something
example: My parents allow me to stay up late on weekends.

definition: a quantity of something
example: A small amount of sugar is fine.

definition: very old; from a long time ago
example: We studied ancient Egyptian history.

definition: to come into view; to seem
example: Stars appear in the sky at night.

definition: to use something for a purpose; to put in a request
example: Apply the rules to every situation.

definition: to give reasons for or against something; to disagree
example: It is not polite to argue at the dinner table.

definition: to reach a place after traveling
example: We will arrive at the station at noon.

definition: to take aggressive action against something or someone
example: The dog tried to attack the mailman.

definition: knowing that something exists or is happening
example: Be aware of your surroundings.

definition: a quality that makes something pleasing to see
example: The beauty of the sunset amazed everyone.

definition: to start doing something
example: Let's begin the lesson with a song.

definition: to think something is true
example: I believe you did your best.

definition: an advantage or gain from something
example: Exercise has many health benefits.

definition: a hard structure in your body that forms the skeleton
example: Dogs love to chew on a bone.

definition: brought into life; created
example: She was born in spring.

definition: the lowest part of something
example: The coin sank to the bottom of the pond.

definition: a part of a tree that grows out from the trunk
example: A bird sat on the branch.

definition: to separate into pieces; a rest or pause
example: Be careful not to break the vase.

definition: giving off a lot of light; very clever
example: The bright sun woke me up.

definition: peaceful and quiet; not worried
example: Stay calm during the storm.

definition: the city that is the center of government; an uppercase letter
example: Seoul is the capital of Korea.

definition: to grab something that is moving
example: Can you catch the ball?

definition: the middle point of something
example: Put the vase in the center of the table.

definition: a period of one hundred years
example: This building is over a century old.

definition: a person in a story; the qualities that make someone who they are
example: The main character of the book is very brave.

definition: to ask a price for something; to move forward quickly
example: How much do they charge for a ticket?

definition: the most important; the leader of a group
example: The chief reason I study is to learn.

definition: to pick one thing from several options
example: Choose your favorite color crayon.

definition: a perfectly round shape
example: Draw a circle around the correct answer.

definition: to say something is true; to take ownership of something
example: He claims he saw a shooting star.

definition: the land next to the ocean
example: We drove along the coast.

definition: to gather things together
example: I collect stamps from around the world.

definition: to join two or more things together
example: Combine flour and sugar to make the dough.

definition: a feeling of ease and well-being
example: A warm blanket brings comfort on a cold night.

definition: to look at how two things are similar or different
example: Compare the two pictures carefully.

definition: to join two things together
example: Connect the dots to see the picture.

definition: to have something inside it
example: This bottle contains fresh orange juice.

definition: to be in charge of something; to manage
example: You must control your speed on this road.

definition: free from mistakes; right
example: Check that your answers are correct.

definition: to make or produce something new
example: Artists create beautiful paintings.

definition: to make a choice after thinking about it
example: Decide which book you want to read.

definition: to say what something is like
example: Describe the picture in one sentence.

definition: a plan or drawing; to plan how something will look
example: The architect designed a tall building.

definition: to damage something so badly that it no longer exists
example: The fire destroyed the old barn.

definition: to grow or change over time; to create something
example: Scientists develop new medicines.

definition: going straight from one place to another; to guide or control
example: Take the direct route to save time.

definition: to find something for the first time
example: Scientists discover new things every year.

definition: to talk about something with other people
example: Let's discuss our plans for the trip.

definition: how far apart two places are
example: What is the distance from here to the school?

definition: to separate into parts; to share equally
example: Divide the pizza into eight slices.

definition: images in your mind while sleeping; a hope for the future
example: I dream of becoming an astronaut.

definition: the result of an action or cause
example: Exercise has a positive effect on your health.

definition: energy used to do something
example: Good results come from hard effort.

definition: one or the other of two things
example: You can choose either the red or blue pen.

definition: having nothing inside
example: The glass is empty.

definition: the power needed to do work or to be active
example: Eating breakfast gives you energy for the day.

definition: to get pleasure from something
example: I enjoy reading science fiction books.

definition: all of something; complete
example: She read the entire book in one day.

definition: the same in size, amount, or value
example: Both teams have an equal number of players.

definition: to start or set up something new
example: They established a new school in the village.

definition: something that happens, especially something important
example: The school fair is a fun event.

definition: perfectly correct; precise
example: Tell me the exact time you arrived.

definition: to look at something carefully
example: The doctor will examine your throat.

definition: not including; other than
example: Everyone came except Tom.

definition: to be real or alive
example: Do dinosaurs still exist? No, they are extinct.

definition: to believe something will happen
example: I expect it will rain tomorrow.

definition: something you have done or lived through
example: Traveling is a great experience.

definition: to travel to discover new places or ideas
example: Let's explore the forest trail.

definition: to show feelings or ideas in words or actions
example: Art helps you express your emotions.

definition: to make something longer or wider
example: They extended the road by two miles.

definition: an open area of land; a subject of study
example: We played soccer in the field.

definition: a number or shape; to work out or calculate
example: She drew a geometric figure.

definition: power used to move or change something; to make someone do something
example: Gravity is the force that pulls us down.

definition: a large area covered with trees
example: We went hiking in the forest.

definition: the time that has not happened yet
example: In the future, robots may do many jobs.

definition: relating to most cases; not specific
example: In general, I prefer warm weather.

definition: the solid surface of the earth
example: Seeds are planted in the ground.
